productDisplayName: Fila Men Cush Flex Black Slippers
description: fila specialises in high-quality footwear. This pair of flip flops from fila showcases the brand's versatility, the styling of the pair pays tribute to the minimalist trend. Pair these with with denims rolled at the cuffs and a casual shirt or a polo collar tee. Upper Thong strap construction in rubber Padded straps with mesh lining for a snug Fit Fabric toe separator for comfort Branding on the strap and footbed Outsole Soft, cushioned footbed in rubber TPU outsole for good grip Irreuglar quadrangular grooves for enhanced grip shoe care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
